chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6508 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.28465/2018 2. For hearing of main case 22.01.2025 Mr. Umer Farooq, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General This petition is pending since 2018 and the prayer clauses reads as follows: “1.In the light of above said conspectus of facts, it is most respectfully prayed that by accepting the instant Petition, the Honourable Court may please direct the respondent #3 to stay the adjudication proceedings till finalization of the Lab report by the respondent #4. 2. It is also prayed to this Honourable Court that please stay the criminal proceedings pending against the petitioner till finalization of the Lab report by respondent #4. 3. It is further prayed that this Honourable Court may direct the respondents not to take any coercive measures against the petitioner till finalization of forensic test report about the seized/impounded articles. 4. It is humbly further prayed that the proceeding pending / continued before the respondent #3 as well as before the special judge customs may please be stayed/suspended as interim arrangement till finalization of the petition in hand” Learned counsel for the petitioner when confronted as to how in presence of an adequate remedy available and being availed this petition could be entertained. He remained unable to satisfy. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed.
He remained unable to satisfy. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
